Rules.InvariantScript:
Text(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, SubmissionDeadline < Today(), Not(IsDraft), CRStatus.Value = "Submitted"))) &
" CR(s) are past their submission deadline and have not been reviewed by PMO."

If(ThisItem.ID = gblConsolidationCR.ID,
  RGBA(174, 214, 241, 0.3),
  If(IsEven(ThisItem.ID), RGBA(249, 249, 249, 1), RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1))
)

Switch(ThisItem.CRStatus.Value,
  "Submitted", RGBA(110,140,176,1),
  "PMO Review", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "In Assessment", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "PMO Consolidation", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  RGBA(31,55,100,1)
)
Filter(CRRequests, CRStatus.Value In ["Submitted","PMO Review","In Assessment","PMO Consolidation"])
"Select a CR from the left panel to view details and take action."
